title: Why Dragons Returned #got #shorts
description: Dragons didn’t just come back by chance. Their return may be tied to magic, prophecy, and a world falling out of balance. This is why dragons returned. #ASOIAF #Dragons #Shorts

scenes.narration: For centuries, dragons were gone—until suddenly, they returned to the world.
scenes.image_prompt: dragon eggs in darkness beginning to glow faintly, mysterious and ancient, dark fantasy, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Their disappearance marked the fading of magic, as if the world itself had begun to weaken.
scenes.image_prompt: empty skies and abandoned dragon pits under fading light, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: But in the books, magic is not gone—it is dormant, waiting for the right moment to rise again.
scenes.image_prompt: hidden magical energy beneath the earth slowly awakening, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: As the Others begin to stir in the North, the balance between ice and fire begins to shift.
scenes.image_prompt: icy forces rising in the North contrasted with distant fire glow, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The return of dragons may not be coincidence—but a response to this growing imbalance.
scenes.image_prompt: dragon egg cracking as icy wind blows around it, symbolic balance, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Some theories suggest dragons are tied directly to magic itself—when one returns, so does the other.
scenes.image_prompt: dragon emerging surrounded by magical energy waves, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: This would explain why ancient prophecies speak of fire rising again when darkness returns.
scenes.image_prompt: ancient prophecy scroll showing dragon and flame symbols, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The world of Westeros may operate on balance—where ice rises, fire must answer.
scenes.image_prompt: massive dragon facing distant icy army, balanced standoff, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: This makes dragons more than creatures—they are forces tied to the fate of the world itself.
scenes.image_prompt: dragon soaring above Westeros map glowing with energy, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Because dragons did not just return to the world—they returned because the world needed them.
scenes.image_prompt: dragon rising into sky at dawn with fire spreading light across horizon, cinematic ending, vertical 1080x1920
